--- 
title: "Tesina Statistica"
author: "Nicola Lancellotti"
--date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
description: ""
---


```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
knitr::read_chunk("dataSet.R")
```

```{r chunk, echo=FALSE}
```

```{r chunk2, echo=FALSE}
```
